title: BEM-858 execute 857
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:54 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem857_route_after_bem856.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
changed_files_local=[]
if rs=='next_patch_dispatcher_commit_response_path':
    commit=Path('scripts/commit_claude_dispatcher_state.sh')
    if commit.exists():
        txt=commit.read_text(errors='ignore')
        if 'governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md' not in txt:
            txt=txt.replace('git add -A governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt', 'git add -A governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md')
            commit.write_text(txt)
            changed_files_local.append(str(commit))
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem858_commit_path_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v17','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-858 dispatch after commit path includes bem844_claude_response.md','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    changed_files_local.append(str(q))
    status='commit_response_path_patched_and_dispatch_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify bem844_claude_response.md'
elif rs=='next_diagnose_response_absence':
    status='response_absence_diagnosis_required'
    next_action='inspect dispatcher workflow, commit script, runtime state and dispatch result'
elif rs=='next_tick_probe':
    status='probe_tick_required'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify probe result'
elif rs=='next_finalize_or_repair_protocol_decision':
    status='protocol_decision_processing_required'
    next_action='read protocol decision and finalize/repair'
else:
    status='unknown_route'
    next_action='diagnose route '+rs
state={'bem':'BEM-858','status':status,'route_status':rs,'local_changes':changed_files_local,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem858_execute_bem857_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem858_execute_bem857_next.md').write_text('# BEM-858 | Execute BEM-857 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem858_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-858'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem858_execute_bem857_next.json','governance/reports/bem858_execute_bem857_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem858_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+changed_files_local
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-857 next action by patching dispatcher commit response path or routing diagnostic/probe/protocol next step')
"""
